name: Raspberry Cream Brownie Wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Lightly grease a 9-inch springform pan. In a small bowl, combine all filling ingredients. Beat for one minute at medium speed; set aside.
3. In a medium saucepan, melt butter and chocolate over low heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and cool slightly. Add sugar and 3 eggs; beat well. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir in Chambord. Spread half of the chocolate mixture in the bottom of the greased pan. Spread filling over the chocolate. Spread remaining chocolate mixture over the filling.
4. Bake for 37-42 minutes or until the center is set. Cool on a rack for five minutes; run a knife around the edge of the pan to loosen. Cool completely; remove from the pan.
5. Melt glaze ingredients over a double boiler. Spread glaze on top of the brownie and cool.
12 servings. Calories: A0. Fat &g
